description_long: This stereo sound system features a compact, boxy design with a textured black exterior resembling a classic guitar amplifier. The front face displays a gold and black control panel above a speaker grille with a diamond-patterned mesh, evoking a vintage aesthetic. The top section houses several control knobs and a visible input jack, while the rear side includes a power input and a label with technical information. The sides are plain except for a visible power switch and cable connection on one side. The object sits on four small feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. Its materials suggest a combination of textured plastic or vinyl, metal for the grille and control panel, and electronic components inside.
description: A compact, vintage-style stereo sound system with a gold control panel, diamond-patterned speaker grille, and textured black casing.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a label with technical details, a power input, and a cable connection.
description_view_1: The left side is mostly plain, showing the depth and textured surface of the casing.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the gold control panel, multiple knobs, and the diamond-patterned speaker grille.
description_view_3: The right side features a power switch, cable connection, and indicator lights.
attribute_brand_logo: A gold logo with the text 'VOX' is visible on the upper left of the front control panel.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille features a brown mesh with a gold diamond lattice pattern, reminiscent of classic amplifier designs.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front, with several round knobs, a visible input jack, and labeled sections; the layout is linear and clearly separated from the speaker grille below.
